title: lepidocaryum tenue var. gracile
intro: Lepidocaryum tenue var. gracile, also known as slender cycad or dwarf cycad, is a type of plant belonging to the family Lepidocarpaceae. Traditionally, Lepidocaryum tenue var. gracile has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial in treating wounds and infections. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and treating digestive issues, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and terpenoids. Lepidocaryum tenue var. gracile is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal benefits, and its young leaves and seeds are used in traditional medicine.
